User.title: User
User.description: A user of the LMS application (teacher or student).

uid.description: The Firebase Auth UID of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

displayName.description: The full name of the user.

avatarUrl.description: URL to the user's avatar image.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user was created.

Class.title: Class
Class.description: A class or course managed by a teacher.

description.description: A brief description of the class.

teacherId.description: The UID of the teacher who owns the class.

studentIds.description: List of UIDs of students enrolled in the class.

code.description: A unique code for students to join the class.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the class was created.

Assignment.title: Assignment
Assignment.description: An assignment or task for students in a class.

classId.description: The ID of the class this assignment belongs to.

teacherId.description: The UID of the teacher who created the assignment.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the assignment was created.

Submission.title: Submission
Submission.description: A student's submission for an assignment.

assignmentId.description: The ID of the assignment being submitted.

studentId.description: The UID of the student submitting the work.

content.description: The content of the submission (text, link, etc.).

score.description: The grade given by the teacher.

submittedAt.description: Timestamp when the submission was made.

classes/{classId}/assignments/{assignmen.description: Stores student submissions for an assignment.
